allow: PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 11196 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CPU -gt 30 } | Select-Object Id, CPU, WorkingSet64)

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CPU -gt 5 } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, CPU, WorkingSet64 | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CPU -gt 5 } | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.CPU -gt 5 } | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count)
